emails.subject: message from Bogdan
emails.body: Dan, I am sending you a resume of one of my compatriots who lives in Houston. I met him socially a few times. He graduated from the same university I did. Vince Forwarded by Vince J Kaminski/HOU/ECT on 02/02/2001 05:00 PM Awenda2000@cs.com on 02/01/2001 09:57:42 AM
